content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates multiple specific, timely reads that change the direction of the conversation. Turn 3 names the flip in real time (client taking responsibility for HIS understanding rather than making him responsible) — a linguistic/stance read that the client herself confirms. Turn 7's 'That's almost defensive' is a precise defensiveness read named at the exact moment it occurs, then routed back into the experiment. Turn 13 names the meta-pattern that just got revealed ('notice what got revealed when you said it the first time, when you didn't know the experiment was happening') — exposing the pattern-is-the-finding. Turn 15 distinguishes the said from the lived ('intellectually, that's where you are') — refusing to engage the silverware metaphor at content level and routing to experiential. Turn 21 is a surgical linguistic read ('we talked about PROTECTING. Your words were protecting') catching the client's escape into a meta-argument. Reads precede questions throughout, and they are specific to AoA (control-as-defense, ego-protection, rehearsing-how-to-say-it).",
  "evidence_turns": [3, 7, 13, 15, 21],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Sets up the experiment frame; no read yet but creates the laboratory in which reads will land."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the flip in real time — client took responsibility for his understanding instead of making him responsible. Specific linguistic/stance read."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Escalates the experiment with specific embodied instruction; not a read per se but enables the next read."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'That's almost defensive' — precise, timely defensiveness read, two words, no lecture, then redirect."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Routes around the 'I can't' without naming it; clean move but no explicit read."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Closes the loop by naming what just happened structurally — the pattern-is-the-finding read."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicitly directs client to notice what got revealed when she didn't know the experiment was happening. Names the meta-pattern."},
    {"turn": 15, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Distinguishes intellectual stance from lived position — refuses the metaphor and reads it as intellectualization."},
    {"turn": 17, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Skillful redirection but more a move than a named read."},
    {"turn": 19, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the ego-protection pattern as a question — implicit read of the entire stance."},
    {"turn": 21, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Surgical linguistic read catching the client's escape into 'drop ego' meta-argument — returns to her exact word 'protecting'."},
    {"turn": 23, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Integration statement."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["defensiveness-as-identity-signal", "rehearsing-how-to-say-it", "intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-experiment-as-escape"],
  "notes": "Reads are visible, specific, and consistently precede or accompany the redirect. Pattern reads (control-as-defense, ego-protection) surface when active."
}
